title: viola heterophylla var. cavillieri
intro: Viola heterophylla var. cavillieri, also known as the Alpine pansy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the violet family (Violaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and even supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Viola heterophylla var. cavillieri is often used as a tea, tincture, or dried herb, and is also used in traditional remedies for its potential to soothe and calm the body.
